title: Olive's Caldo Verde
description: A buttery, flaky Venezuelan dish featuring olives in a paleo-friendly caldo verde style, perfect for a comforting lunch.

ingredients.name: Olives (kalamata or green), pitted and halved

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pot over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic to sweat for about 5 minutes, until translucent.
Stir in red bell pepper slices and continue cooking for another 4-5 minutes.
Fold in olives ensuring they release their juices into the mixture.
Add chopped cilantro and mix well with remaining ingredients.
Reduce heat to low and let simmer gently for about 10 minutes until slightly thickened.
Serve hot as a side dish or over paleo-friendly bread.
